label: The Filament Anchorage
description: The Filament Anchorage functions as a spaceport set directly into the tensile geometry of the Hollow Lattice, where luminous strands thicken into load-bearing arcs and mooring planes. Its berths consist of stepped platforms of glass-dark composite, each inscribed with repeating cell-grids that regulate approach vectors through the void-channels. Radiant filaments run through the concourse walls as structural veins, casting hard-edged light that measures distance in strict intervals. Customs bays, freight cradles, and transit galleries align to a single axial spine, enforcing the Cosmos’s precise order upon all arrivals and departures.
